title: input_values.tsv row — WHAT-IN (BEAGLE / dosage / SAF / GL)
description:
One file containing per-(sample × site) values: BEAGLE genotype likelihoods, dosage matrix, SAF, raw VCF, etc. Has a strict three-way contract: the file's sample order must match sample_set, the file's row count must match site_set's n_sites, and both must lie under the declared interval_set.

Everything downstream (ngsRelate, ngsAdmix, PCA) consumes ONE input_value plus a sample/group/interval scope. The contract checker (scripts/check_result_contract.py) validates this row's three FKs every time a result is registered.

sample_set_id.description: FK into sample_sets.tsv. The file's per-sample columns (BEAGLE: 3 per sample) MUST be in this set's order.

site_set_id.description: FK into site_sets.tsv. The file's data rows MUST cover exactly these sites in order.

interval_set_id.description: FK into interval_sets.tsv. The interval scope the file was extracted under.

n_rows.description: Number of data rows. Should equal site_set's n_sites.

n_sample_columns.description: Number of per-sample columns. For BEAGLE that's 3*n_samples (AA/Aa/aa triplets).
